rows.label: qev065102_MSG0001
rows.name:
...Tch.
So the lower lifeforms have made their appearance.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev065102_MSG0002
rows.name:
Hey...
You are acting too insolent before our magnificent king.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev065102_SEL0011
rows.name: Ask where exactly this king is.

rows.label: qev065102_MSG0003
rows.name:
I see. To think you came all the way here
and still know absolutely nothing.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev065102_MSG0004
rows.name:
In that case, just die as you are...
I shall now execute Lady Fortun's orders.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev065102_MSG0005
rows.name:
...In response to your ugly, reckless bravado,
an order has come down from Lady Fortun.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev065102_MSG0006
rows.name:
She says... to kill you.
I shall execute the order immediately.[ST:wait ]
